headline: Salesforce (CRM) Lands Broad Air Force Role Managing A Global Military Vehicle Fleet
summary: Salesforce's Missionforce National Security platform has been broadly adopted by the U.S. Air Force for global fleet management. The 441st Vehicle Support Chain Operations Squadron is using Missionforce to manage vehicles and support mission readiness across worldwide operations. The rollout reflects increased use of secure cloud and AI-integrated tools in mission-critical U.S. defense logistics. Salesforce (NYSE:CRM) is drawing fresh attention after the U.S. Air Force moved to wide...

headline: Salesforce Teams Face Growing Exposure Risk as Access, Configuration, and Code Complexity Increase
summary: Following recent high-profile Salesforce breach claims, including claims related to the ShinyHunters group, AutoRABIT issued guidance to help organizations review the controls that determine how Salesforce data is accessed, exposed, monitored, governed, and recovered.

content.title: Salesforce Teams Face Growing Exposure Risk as Access, Configuration, and Code Complexity Increase
content.summary: Following recent high-profile Salesforce breach claims, including claims related to the ShinyHunters group, AutoRABIT issued guidance to help organizations review the controls that determine how Salesforce data is accessed, exposed, monitored, governed, and recovered.
